description: Two POSTs presenting the same Idempotency-Key and an identical body create exactly one resource: the second request returns the first request's exact recorded response (including its 201 status and the same resource id) without re-executing the create.

expected.reason: The second response is byte-identical to the first (same id, same revision) because it was replayed from the Idempotency-Key cache rather than executed — a second CreateScopeNode side effect never ran.
